base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tourian_zebetite_block — a tile from 1986 metroid. Zebetite — Mother Brain protection-column. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Zebetite — Mother Brain protection-column; 2-frame pulse; 5 Missiles each to destroy; guards Mother Brain chamber (3 total required)
